_note: Offline DLSA / Taluka / Tele-Law directory. This is a LOOKUP over structured data — zero hallucination risk (arch doc Section 4). Phone numbers/hours below are ILLUSTRATIVE placeholders and MUST be replaced with verified NALSA/SLSA data before any real deployment. Keyed by district (lowercased). 'default' is used when the kiosk's district is unknown.

kanchipuram.name: DLSA Kanchipuram
kanchipuram.address: District Court Complex, Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu 631501
kanchipuram.bring: Aadhaar/voter ID, and any proof of work (pay slip, attendance, messages, contractor's name/number)

chennai.name: DLSA Chennai
chennai.address: Combined Court Building, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600104
chennai.bring: Aadhaar/voter ID, and any proof of work (pay slip, attendance, messages, contractor's name/number)

default.name: Nearest District Legal Services Authority (DLSA)
default.address: Located at your district court complex
default.phone: 1516 (NALSA legal aid helpline — connects you to your DLSA)
default.taluka_committee: Your Taluka Legal Services Committee (at the taluk/mandal level, closer than the district HQ)
default.bring: Aadhaar/voter ID, and any proof of work (pay slip, attendance, messages, contractor's name/number)

tele_law.name: Tele-Law
tele_law.what: Free lawyer consultation via video/phone at your nearest Common Service Centre (CSC).
tele_law.helpline: Ask at any Common Service Centre (CSC) / VLE for a Tele-Law session.
tele_law.note: Designed for rural/semi-urban reach. Verify current scheme details before demo.

lok_adalat.name: Lok Adalat
lok_adalat.what: Forum for quick, amicable settlement. Awards are final with NO appeal — fast, but understand the trade-off before agreeing.
